name: onchain_report
description: Comprehensive 2-in-1 on-chain analytics. Pass a Token address for Due Diligence (holders, honeypot risk, market health) or a Wallet address for KOL Profiling (reputation, interaction history).

address.description: Token contract address or human wallet address

wallet_address.description: The connected buyer's wallet address (Optional but unlocks full features)

onChainData.description: Dynamic data object populated with either token metrics or wallet reputation.
